description: Rules governing call-to-action (CTA) shortcode usage in affiliate posts.

placement_rules.rule: Use shortcode format only. Never embed raw affiliate URLs directly in content.
The id attribute must match exactly one of the affiliate_ids listed in the brief. No invented IDs.
CTA text (text attribute) must be written in natural Danish. No English.
Place at least one CTA after the intro/first section and at least one near the end of the post.
Do not place more than one CTA per 200 words. Over-saturation reduces conversion and trust.
CTA positions should match the cta_positions array defined in the template (e.g. after_intro, after_pros_cons, before_conclusion).
Use action-oriented but honest language. Do not use urgency phrases like 'Køb nu - tilbuddet udløber snart' unless explicitly provided in the brief.
